ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN infrastructure will undergo routine maintenance on **Monday, 23 April 2026, from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM UTC**. During this window, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable.

To minimize disruption, we recommend the following actions:

1. Save any active work and log out of VPN services before the maintenance window.
2. Schedule critical tasks to run after 04:00 AM UTC.
3. If you encounter any connectivity issues post‑maintenance, contact the IT Help Desk at 555‑123‑4567 or email helpdesk@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

IT Operations Team
Company Name

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended! Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

Our security team has detected unusual activity on your crypto wallet. As a result, your wallet has been temporarily suspended to protect your assets.

To restore access immediately, please verify your identity by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to complete this verification within 24 hours will result in permanent suspension of your wallet.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Security Team
Cryptocurrency Exchange
